Cao Yong śõĻśįł
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Cao Yong (śõĻśįł). General of Cao Ren. Killed by Pang De, who also took his horse. Cao Yong is a fictional character. Cao Yong was affiliated with the Wei Kingdom. Cao Yong lived during the Later Han Dynasty period of Chinese history.
